description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the busybox:latest Docker image and define three stages: build, test, and deploy. Set a before_script that echoes three messages and an after_script that echoes two messages. Add a build1 job in the build stage that runs echo "Do your build here". Add two parallel test jobs (test1 and test2) in the test stage that run their respective echo commands: test1 echoes "Do a test here" and "For example run a test suite", test2 echoes "Do another parallel test here" and "For example run a lint test". Add a deploy1 job in the deploy stage that runs echo "Do your deploy here", with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
